hero.subheadline: Make smarter, automated business decisions with deep AI-driven demand forecasting and inventory optimization that continually learns from your data.

features.title: How It Works
features.description: Our AI platform transforms raw operational metrics into clean, actionable intelligence in four dynamic steps.
features.dataCollectionDesc: Real-time ingestion of sales, inventory, and market data from multiple sources.
features.aiForecastingDesc: Deep learning models analyze patterns and predict future demand with 95%+ accuracy.
features.optimizationEngineDesc: Mathematical optimization algorithms determine optimal inventory levels.
features.businessDecisionsDesc: Actionable insights and automated recommendations for smarter decisions.

useCases.title: Industry Solutions
useCases.description: Tailored AI solutions for every industry vertical
useCases.retailDesc: Optimize store inventory, reduce overstock, and never miss a sale with precise demand predictions.
useCases.ecommerceDesc: Scale your online operations with AI-driven inventory management across warehouses.
useCases.manufacturingDesc: Align production schedules with demand forecasts to minimize waste and maximize efficiency.
useCases.pharmaciesDesc: Ensure critical medications are always available while minimizing expired stock.

metrics.title: Business Impact
metrics.description: Real results from companies using our AI-powered platform
metrics.carryingCostDesc: Inventory carrying costs typically run 25–30% of stock value
